input.sql: /* SHARDINGSPHERE_HINT: NONE_UNIQUE_KEY_SCENARIO=DECRYPT */ select username from t_config where username is null limit 1;

output.sql: select cipher_username from `encrypt_ds`.t_config where plain_username is null and cipher_username is not null limit 1;

input.sql: /* SHARDINGSPHERE_HINT: NONE_UNIQUE_KEY_SCENARIO=DECRYPT */ select `username` from `t_config` where `username` is null limit 1;

output.sql: select `cipher_username` from `encrypt_ds`.`t_config` where `plain_username` is null and `cipher_username` is not null limit 1;
